title: Bandung、West Java — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Bandung、West Java的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Bandung是West Java的一个城市，人口约2,544,000。West Java’s cultural and creative hub, known for its cooler climate, art deco architecture, and university scene.
